Classes
Class
Description
BaseJpaRepositoryBase<T,K,I>
a base class for all transactional repositories to use the same persistence unit
ExemploJpaReportingRepositoryBase
a base class for all reporting repositories to use the same persistence unit
InMemoryInitializer
A static initialiser to make sure there is the default bootstrapping data, namely power user, when using the in memory repositories.
